name: Paul F. Tompkins
bio: Paul F. Tompkins is an American comedian, actor, and writer known for a dapper, suit-and-tie persona and a storytelling, observational stand-up style built on extended absurdist riffs. A Mr. Show writer-performer, he is prolific in podcasting, including hundreds of appearances on Comedy Bang! Bang!, and voiced Mr. Peanutbutter on the animated series BoJack Horseman. His stand-up specials include You Should Have Told Me and Laboring Under Delusions.

timeline.ev: Writes for and performs on Mr. Show with Bob and David
Begins monthly Paul F. Tompkins Show at Largo
Releases album Impersonal; appears in There Will Be Blood
Releases special You Should Have Told Me
Voices Mr. Peanutbutter on BoJack Horseman

accolades: Emmy nomination as a Mr. Show writer (1998)
Voice of Mr. Peanutbutter on BoJack Horseman (2014-2020)
The Pod F. Tompkast ranked #1 comedy podcast by Rolling Stone (2011)
